## Checklist

- [ ] Public API or package export changes are documented in `README.md` and `docs/REFERENCE.md`.
- [ ] Golden outputs were updated with `npm run golden:update` when deterministic color output changed.
- [ ] Demo changes were checked with `npm run demo:typecheck` and `npm run demo:build`.
- [ ] Runtime compatibility was considered for Node, Deno, Bun, workers, and browsers.
- [ ] Size and benchmark impacts are intentional and noted in the PR.
